description: Composition Black boxer shorts from playboy made of 100% cotton, has a soft elasticated waistband, a buttoned pocket at the back and embroidered branding on the left thigh Procured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) – the India licensee for Playboy Men’s Underwear Wash care Machine wash cold at 40 degrees with like colours Use only non chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Cool iron Once you experience the superior comfort and cheeky style of Playboy inner wear, there's no going back. Crafted from soft cotton/lycra blend with soft elastic, perfect for your comfort, Playboy has kept your convenience in mind while designing this pair of briefs.
